title: Ancient Coins
description: Adds ancient coins obtained trough archaeology, you can use them to trade with other players
body:
# Ancient Coins

Adds ancient coins obtained trough archeology, you can use them to trade with other players.

### This project is in beta and not all features are present at this moment

For the moment, there is 2 common types of coin (gold and iron), and 4 unique types, depending on the area of excavation.

## Upcoming features
- New NPC : Coin collector
- Other uses for some coins
